notes: Mixed tape — semis sliding and Treasury yields rising pressure Nasdaq while SPY/Dow hold up; VIX steady at 16.0 with Warsh testimony live and retail-sales/jobless data in play. Holding 0.45 neutral into a choppy open; most positions green but chip weakness keeps me cautious.
journal_entry: Thu 7/16 10:29: held 0.45 neutral, VIX flat 16.0. Semis leading futures lower again and yields up, but book is mostly green (REZI +10.5%, META +4.3%, SPY +2.7%). Still parking extended AAPL, weak TSLA (-5.5%)/ANAB (-17%), CNMD, crypto, lagging IWM and CVI. Watching Warsh testimony and whether chips stabilize.
